disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No swelling/redness around the eyes, no double vision or eye-movement pain, vision normal
trigger_question_examples: Any swelling or redness around your eyes?
Any double vision or pain when moving your eyes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — my eyes look normal, no double vision and moving them doesn't hurt.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No severe unremitting headache, neck stiffness or confusion
trigger_question_examples: Any severe unrelenting headache or a stiff neck?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No stiff neck, no confusion — it's the face pressure that's bad.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Illness <10 days; no biphasic 'double-sickening' (initial improvement then worsening)
trigger_question_examples: How many days total, and did you start improving then get worse again?
Has it been steadily one illness or two phases?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: About 5 days, all one illness — no getting better then worse again.
